basic_info.headline: RL Engineering
basic_info.about:
Building RL training systems to make powerful AI systems safe, robust, and steerable.

Previously, building distributed database engines at Databricks and SingleStore (aka MemSQL).

experience.title: Member of Technical Staff (RL Engineering)
experience.description: Building RL training systems to make powerful AI systems safe, robust, and steerable.

experience.title: Staff Software Engineer
experience.description: Working on making queries go fast.

experience.title: Engineering Manager / Senior Software Engineer II
experience.description:
Tech lead/manager for Query Optimization at SingleStore (formerly known as MemSQL), building high-performance, scalable distributed query processing for real-time workloads across both OLTP and OLAP.

I've been building database engine internals for 7 years, from IC to tech lead and manager. I lead engineers ranging from L3 to L7, growing them into senior and leadership roles. I leverage deep technical expertise and insight into customer needs to drive strategy, prioritization, design, and execution, collaborating across product areas from storage to front-end and with cross-functional partners from PM to SE.

Projects I've led include:
- Building our distributed query optimizer from the ground up, including join enumeration, costing, and query rewrites.
- Rearchitecting foundations of the query processor, including query/plan representation, transformations, compilation, statistics, costing.
- Building automatic statistics that efficiently keeps stats up-to-date with low-overhead incremental maintenance. Efficiently maintain multiple types of stats (histograms, cardinality, sampling) and combine them for more robust estimates, across multiple table formats (rowstore and columnstore) and datatypes.
- Building workload management to schedule and manage resources of distributed queries, increasing perf and stability.
- Building performance testing infra used across the product, and cross-cutting benchmarking efforts for TPC-H/DS/C.
- Improving engineering processes across the organization for code reviews, documentation, and support escalations.

SingleStore is hiring for engineering roles worldwide. https://www.singlestore.com/careers/ From vectorized SIMD query execution to LLVM-based JIT query compilation to high-performance distributed transactions, join us at SingleStore to solve the toughest problems in the computer science world and build the world's fastest and most powerful database.
